Instructions for overriding generated resource files to use a specific font compression system resource.

# Purpose
The files in this directory are used to override the automatically generated `resource_ids.auto.h` file. This allows the use of the `fixtures/font_compression/system_resources.pbpack` file. The `system_resources.pbpack` file is generated by adding a specific stanza to the `resources/normal/base/resource_map.json` file. This stanza defines a font resource with properties such as type, name, file path, compatibility version, and compression method. After adding the stanza, the `system_resources.pbpack` file is rebuilt. For details on which files require updates, refer to the `tools/update_test_system_pbpack.sh` script.
